content:
User: ok but it seems to be running fine? show me the logs with erros and the problem created

GitHub Copilot: Grabbing latest VS Code Insiders log files and grepping for errors.

Created 9 todos

Ran terminal command: LOG_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code - Insiders/logs" if [ -d "$LOG_ROOT" ]; then latest=$(ls -1t "$LOG_ROOT" | head -1); echo "Latest log folder: $latest" cd "$LOG_ROOT/$latest" || exit 1; echo "--- main.log errors ---" grep -iE 'error|exception|vscode-neovim' main.log | head -n 40 || echo "(no matches in main.log)" echo "--- sharedprocess.log errors ---" grep -iE 'error|exception' sharedprocess.log | head -n 40 || echo "(no matches in sharedprocess.log)" echo "--- renderer1.log errors ---" grep -iE 'error|exception|vscode-neovim' renderer1.log | head -n 40 || echo "(no matches in renderer1.log)" else echo "Log root not found: $LOG_ROOT" fi

Ran terminal command: LOG_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code - Insiders/logs/20251116T180443" echo "Listing files in $LOG_ROOT" ls -1; echo "Attempt broad grep of error lines:" grep -iE 'error|exception|neovim' * 2>/dev/null | head -n 60 || echo "No error matches in plain files"
